title: Manually Re-trigger a failed workform/ automation

posts.author: DeeDee (Mandee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently when an automation fails there is not a way (that I have found) to trigger the automation to run again after the issue that caused the failure has been resolved. Standard automations and in workflows. Allowing the manual trigger to re-run an automation helps with troubleshooting and consistency. Currently the only option is to re-create / replicate the trigger actions. This can be problematic when items are created based on a form submission and you don’t want to lose the submission form.

What are you trying to achieve

To manually re-run an automation if the automation fails to aid in troubleshooting and prevent the loss of data and/or keep consistency in the work flow for an item.
